title: Guides: AI in Academic Research and Writing: AI Tools for Academic Research & Writing
description: of features or usage.    Ai2 Asta (completely free and open source tool)  Consensus (OSU has trial access to Consensus through September 2026)   + Consensus FAQs and Best Practices  Elicit   + Elicit FAQs and Support   + How to use Elicit responsibly  Keenious   + Keenious Help Center   SciSpace  Scite  Undermind  ChatGPT Custom GPTs   + Consensus   + Dimensions Research GPT   + ScholarAI   + SciSpace   The following tools are built on the use of citation networks and mapping to discover and visualize connections between research papers and do not primarily rely on generative AI, although they may include some features    Connected Papers  Inciteful   + Inciteful Quick Start  Litmaps   + Getting Started with Litmaps YouTube playlist  Research Rabbit   + A Total Beginners Guide to Research
